|group6=Kashmiri Brahmins |list6= * [[Kashmiri Pandits]]
|group7=[[Madhva Brahmin]]s |list7= * [[Deshastha Brahmin]] * [[Shivalli Brahmins|Shivalli Brahmin]] * [[Shivalli Brahmins|Shivalli Madhva Brahmin]] * [[Hebbar]]
|group8=[[Malayali Brahmin]]s |list8= * [[Ambalavasi]] * [[Chakyar]] * [[Ilayathu]] * [[Kerala Iyer]] * [[Moothath]] * [[Nambeesan]] * [[Nambiar (Ambalavasi caste)|Nambiar]] * [[Nair]] * [[Nambudiri]] * [[Pushpaka Brahmin]] * [[Pushpaka|Pushpaka Unni]] * [[Potti]]
|group9=[[Marathi Brahmin]]s |list9= * [[Chitpavan Brahmins|Chitpavan Brahmin]] * [[Daivadnya|Daivadnya Brahmin]] * [[Deshastha Brahmin]] * [[Devrukhe Brahmin]] * [[Karhade Brahmin]] * [[Konkani people#Sub-ethnic groups|Konkani Brahmin]] * [[Kudaldeshkar Gaud Brahmin]] * [[Peshwa]] * [[Rajapur Saraswat|Rajapur Saraswat Brahmin]]
|group10=[[Manipuri Brahmin]] |list10= * [[Kamrupi Brahmin]]
|group11=[[Maithil Brahmin]] |list11= * [[Aboti Brahmin]] * [[Bhumihar]] * [[Gayawal Brahmin]] * [[Kanyakubja Brahmin]] * [[Gautam Brahmin]] * [[Golapurab Brahmin]] * [[Gurav]] * [[Kanyakubja Brahmin]] * [[Maga Brahmin]] * [[Malviya Brahmin]] * [[Nagar Brahmin]] * [[Naramdev Brahmin]] * [[Sanadhya Brahmin]]
|group12=[[Bahun|Nepali Brahmins]] |list12= *[[Joshi|Jaishi Brahmin]] *[[Saraswat Brahmin]]
|group13=[[Saraswat Brahmin|Punjabi Brahmins]] |list13= * [[Bias Brahmin]] * [[Gaur Brahmins|Gaur Brahmin]] * [[Gautam Brahmin]] * [[Hussaini Brahmin]] * [[Maga Brahmin]] * [[Mohyal Brahmin]]
|group14=Odia Brahmins |list14= * [[Bias Brahmin]] * [[Rath (Odia surname)|Rath Brahmin]] * [[Samvedi]] * [[Utkala Brahmin]]
|group15=[[Saraswat Brahmin]]s |list15= * [[Saraswat Kundiya Samaj]] * [[Gaud Saraswat Brahmin]] * [[Chitrapur Saraswat Brahmin]] * [[Rajapur Saraswat|Rajapur Saraswat Brahmin]] * [[Gaur Brahmins|Gaur Brahmin]] * [[Bias Brahmin]] * [[Dadheech Brahmin]] * [[Sanadhya Brahmin]] * [[Anavil|Anavil Brahmin]] * [[Audichya Brahmin]] * [[Bardai Brahmin]] * [[Girnara Brahmin]] * [[Gurav]] * [[Hussaini Brahmin]] * [[Khedaval]] * [[Modh]] * [[Mohyal Brahmin]] * [[Nagar Brahmin]] * [[Saryuparin Brahmin]] * [[Sidhra-Rudhra Brahmin]] * [[Sompura Brahmin]] * [[Shrimali Brahmin]] * [[Brahmin Swarnkar]] * [[Yajurvedi]]
|group16=[[Tamil Brahmin]]s |list16= * [[Ashtasahasram]] * [[Hebbar Iyengar]] * [[Iyengar]] * [[Iyer]] * [[Kanyakumari Brahmin]] * [[Rigvedi]]
